description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a sleek, modern design, predominantly covered in a rich blue leather-like material. The shoe features metallic gold accents on the heel tab, eyelets, and a rectangular patch on the tongue, adding a touch of luxury and style. The upper is smooth with a subtle grain texture, and there are no visible laces, suggesting it is either a slip-on or designed for decorative lacing. The sole is white, flat, and appears to be made of rubber, providing contrast and a classic sneaker look. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with a rounded toe and a slightly padded collar for comfort. The shoe appears clean, unworn, and structurally intact, suitable for urban casual wear.
description: A blue low-top sneaker with gold metallic accents and a white rubber sole, featuring a smooth, grained upper and no visible laces. The design is modern, clean, and appears new.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the gold metallic heel tab and the white rubber sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue upper, gold eyelets, and the gold heel accent.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, gold patch on the tongue, and absence of laces.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible gold eyelets and heel accent.
